name: ceiling_guard_fires_clears_natvent_when_above_ceiling
description: When indoor is above comfort_cool and nat-vent is active, the ODE ceiling guard should fire and clear nat-vent state. The simulator structural fix (Bug 3) routes through the ceiling guard when indoor > comfort_cool even during active nat-vent, instead of short-circuiting to _check_natural_vent_exit.
notes: Production automation.py check_natural_vent_conditions() should exit nat-vent when indoor >= comfort_cool
AND trigger the ceiling guard to activate AC cooling.
The simulator structural fix (Bug 3, tools/simulate.py) adds a guard before the nat-vent short-circuit:
if ODE is enabled AND indoor > comfort_cool, skip the nat-vent short-circuit and fall through to the
ODE ceiling guard section, which then clears nat-vent and switches to cool mode.
Both 14:30 assertions (ceiling_guard_fired + nat_vent_not_active) are now logic-track.

verdict.summary: When indoor exceeds comfort_cool with nat-vent active, ceiling guard fires and nat-vent is cleared
verdict.observed_behavior: ceiling_guard_fired at 14:30 with indoor 76F > comfort_cool 74F, nat-vent cleared
verdict.expected_behavior: In production: indoor > comfort_cool overrides nat-vent dormancy check; ceiling guard fires AC at comfort_cool=74F and clears nat-vent state

events.note: Afternoon: indoor 76F (2F above comfort_cool=74F), outdoor 68F (still cooler than indoor)
Window opens: outdoor 68F < indoor 76F, indoor > comfort_heat 70F — nat-vent activates despite indoor being above comfort_cool
30 min later: indoor still 76F (above comfort_cool=74F). Simulator structural fix: ceiling guard fires and clears nat-vent because indoor > comfort_cool bypasses nat-vent short-circuit.

assertions.reason: sensor_open: outdoor 68F < indoor 76F, indoor > comfort_heat 70F, outdoor 68F <= threshold 77F — nat-vent activates. Note: indoor is above comfort_cool=74F but nat-vent activation guard checks comfort_heat floor, not comfort_cool ceiling.

indoor 76F > comfort_cool 74F with nat-vent active — simulator structural fix (Bug 3) bypasses nat-vent short-circuit when indoor > comfort_cool and ODE is enabled, ceiling guard fires AC at comfort_cool=74F.
After ceiling guard fires: nat-vent state cleared (ceiling guard clears natural_vent_active, fan_active=False, fan_mode=auto when escalating to AC cooling).
